ns0:entry.ns0:title: Eventual-Inc/Daft
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Eventual-Inc/Daft
Language: rust
High-performance data engine for AI and multimodal workloads. Process images, audio, video, and structured data at any scale

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GitoxideLabs/gitoxide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GitoxideLabs/gitoxide
Language: rust
An idiomatic, lean, fast & safe pure Rust implementation of Git

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GraphiteEditor/Graphite
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GraphiteEditor/Graphite
Language: rust
Open source comprehensive 2D content creation tool suite for graphic design, digital art, and interactive real-time motion graphics — featuring node-based procedural editing

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
Language: rust
Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexpasmantier/television
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexpasmantier/television
Language: rust
A very fast, portable and hackable fuzzy finder.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ast-grep/ast-grep
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ast-grep/ast-grep
Language: rust
⚡A CLI tool for code structural search, lint and rewriting. Written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: boa-dev/boa
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/boa-dev/boa
Language: rust
Boa is an embeddable Javascript engine written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mayocream/koharu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mayocream/koharu
Language: rust
ML-powered manga translator, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: memvid/memvid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/memvid/memvid
Language: rust
Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-term memory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: neondatabase/neon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/neondatabase/neon
Language: rust
Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rivet-dev/rivet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rivet-dev/rivet
Language: rust
Rivet Actors are the primitive for stateful workloads. Built for AI agents, collaborative apps, and durable execution.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: screenpipe/screenpipe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/screenpipe/screenpipe
Language: rust
screenpipe turns your computer into a personal AI that knows everything you've done. record. search. automate. all local, all private, all yours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zellij-org/zellij
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zellij-org/zellij
Language: rust
A terminal workspace with batteries included
